evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long contributes $1261.5 across 34 VALID_0DTE trades with fast median hold near 5 minutes, but owns the global -513.4 MAE. The worst row combines ES-VWAP 26.69, pullback-from-high 9.25, rolling-high distance 14.25, negative VWAP acceleration, RSI 42.42, ADX 17.95, and delayed TP after 80 minutes.
name: Charm Pin High-Extension Tail Box
risk: The tail box can still remove profitable delayed recoveries because the bad trade ultimately closed green; require strict PnL and protected-winner retention before promotion.
trigger: VALID_0DTE charm_pin_pullback_long entries with high ES extension, recent-high rejection/pullback, weak momentum warnings, and stalled VWAP acceleration.
validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL, >=95% protected fast extended-VWAP winners, total net profit >=98% of run_029, and slow_12h remains 0.

evidence: Analyzer path stats show the worst tail had MFE after MAE and first +1.5 points only after 80 minutes, while protected fast extended-VWAP winners usually resolve quickly. Static config can only approximate this behavior.
name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
risk: Path-aware logic can overfit a small tail sample unless validated against protected fast-winner UTCS and out-of-sample days.
trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long high-extension entries that fail to make early positive progress after entry.
validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE below the current -513.4 while retaining >=90% profile PnL, >=95% protected fast-winner count, and total score flat or better.
